name: Falco Totem Destroyer
detailed_description:
A fun physics puzzle! The goal of each level is to sacrifice the Totem of Gluttony, which, according to the shamans, will devour the entire harvest if it is not destroyed! Use the mouse to destroy wooden boxes that prevent the Totem from falling into the fire! But you should be careful, as the number of available clicks is limited!
Falco Totem Destroyer is an unusual physical puzzle game where you need to drop a Totem into the fire, destroying objects.

Features of the game:
  • Bright graphics
  • Unusual gameplay
  • Fun music
